content:
AI Builders Digest — 2026年3月26日

今日精选 10 条最热门 AI 资讯

X / Twitter

#1 🔥 31516 likes

Claude

💻 Claude：Claude Code 推出自动模式，AI 编程助手的重大更新

原文链接 →

💡 对开发者：AI 编程工具的权限控制更加智能，了解安全最佳实践。

💡 对企业：在保证安全的前提下，允许 AI 工具提高团队生产力。

#1 🔥 31516 likes

Claude

New in Claude Code: auto mode. Instead of approving every file write and bash command, or skipping permissions entirely, auto mode lets Claude make permission decisions on your behalf. Safeguards check each action before it runs. https://t.co/kHbTN2jrWw

Source →

#2 🔥 21171 likes

Andrej Karpathy

⚠️ Andrej Karpathy 警示：LiteLLM PyPI 供应链攻击，97M 月下载量的开源库被篡改

原文链接 →

💡 对开发者：优先使用官方认证的包，审查依赖来源，考虑使用依赖锁定文件。

💡 对企业：建立供应链安全流程，定期审计依赖，使用依赖扫描工具（如 Snyk）。

#2 🔥 21171 likes

Andrej Karpathy

Software horror: litellm PyPI supply chain attack. Simple `pip install litellm` was enough to exfiltrate SSH keys, AWS/GCP/Azure creds, Kubernetes configs, git credentials, env vars (all your API keys), shell history, crypto wallets, SSL private keys, CI/CD secrets, database passwords. LiteLLM itself has 97 million downloads per month which is already terrible, but much worse, the contagion spreads to any project that depends on litellm. For example, if you did `pip install dspy` (which depen...

Source →

#3 🔥 5437 likes

Sam Altman

🏗️ Sam Altman：AI 不会取代开发者，而是让开发者能到达步行无法到达的地方

原文链接 →

💡 对开发者：持续关注 AI 工具的发展，尝试在工作中应用新工具提升效率。

💡 对企业：评估 AI 技术对业务的潜在影响，关注竞争对手的 AI 应用动态。

#3 🔥 5437 likes

Sam Altman

AI will help discover new science, such as cures for diseases, which is perhaps the most important way to increase quality of life long-term. AI will also present new threats to society that we have to address. No company can sufficiently mitigate these on their own; we will need a society-wide response to things like novel bio threats, a massive and fast change to the economy, extremely capable models causing complex emergent effects across society, and more. These are the areas the OpenAI Fo...

#6 🔥 1654 likes

Guillermo Rauch

🚀 Guillermo Rauch：Vercel 内部 SaaS 已被 AI 生成的应用取代

原文链接 →

💡 对开发者：AI 生成的应用正在改变开发方式，UI 正成为数据的函数。

💡 对企业：评估无头化（headless）架构，为 AI 代理时代做准备。

#6 🔥 1654 likes

Guillermo Rauch

Almost every SaaS app inside Vercel has now been replaced with a generated app or agent interface, deployed on Vercel. Support, sales, marketing, PM, HR, dataviz, even design and video workflows. It’s shocking. The SaaSpocalypse is both understated and overstated. Over because the key systems of record and storage are still there (Salesforce, Snowflake, etc.) Understated because the software we are generating is more beautiful, personalized, and crucially, fits our business problems better. ...

Source →

#7 🔥 1544 likes

Claude

💻 Claude：Claude Code 推出自动模式，AI 编程助手的重大更新

原文链接 →

💡 对开发者：AI 编程工具的权限控制更加智能，了解安全最佳实践。

💡 对企业：在保证安全的前提下，允许 AI 工具提高团队生产力。

#7 🔥 1544 likes

Claude

Before each tool call, a classifier reviews it for potentially destructive actions. Safe actions proceed automatically. Risky ones get blocked, and Claude takes a different approach. This reduces risk but doesn't eliminate it. We recommend using it in isolated environments.

Source →
